name: Ravi Shankar
title: Full Stack Developer
tagline: Building modern web applications with passion and precision
bio: I'm a full-stack developer with expertise in Spring and React/Angular. I have a passion for building complex, dynamic web applications that provide exceptional user experiences. My expertise includes Spring framework for server-side development, Spring Security for authentication and access management, ReactJS for client-side development, RESTful APIs, and database design and implementation (SQL, MongoDB, etc.).
